race.description: Copy Bets With Tabtouch Bet Loop Mdn
race.comment: BRILLIANT IN RED (13) won her recent trial in readiness for this and the inside draw is a big tick for her on debut. Out of the handy mare Lil' Red Bikini, she should get every chance on debut with Watson sticking from the trials. Can make an immediate impact. DELZEE (5) trialled well coming into his debut and he was impressive over this track and trip, beaten 1L when in the market. Nottle hopping on board is a good push for his chances and although he's drawn wide, he makes plenty of appeal. THE ROCKET (2) ended last campaign in the Challenge Stakes at Ascot where he was 4L off the winner. His form prior was solid and his recent trial suggests he's up to the mark first-up. Can resume on a positive note. KUTE AS KAN BE (12) will be fitter for a couple of trials coming into this and can make her presence felt. ROCK THE FOX (7) gets the blinkers on now and an improved effort is expected.
